summary: Comprehensive testing of AI Generation features for Frameflow. 14/15 backend tests passed, 1 flaky failure due to 502 timeout. All critical features working: Content Swipe generates images with valid base64, Reel Generation produces MP4 videos, Photoshoot generates product photos, Website Scraping extracts brand info and images. Frontend UI verified for all pages.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 timeout - flaky due to long generation time (60-90s)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test client (TEST_Coffee Shop / Starbucks Coffee Company)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AI generation features verified working. DALL-E image generation uses Emergent LLM key with retry logic. FFmpeg reel generation creates valid MP4 videos. Website scraping extracts brand info, colors, logo, products, and saves images to library. Content Swipe, Photoshoot, Concept Post, and Template Clone all generate valid base64 images.

features_verified.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows 5 Total Clients, stats, Credit Management
features_verified.client_dashboard: PASS - Shows all creation modes: Content Swipe, Concept, Clone Template, Variations, Photoshoot, Reel
features_verified.content_swipe_page: PASS - Shows count options (2,3,5,6), credit info
features_verified.content_swipe_generate: PASS - Generates creatives with valid base64 images
features_verified.reel_generation_cinematic: PASS - Generates MP4 video with caption/hashtags
features_verified.reel_generation_casual: PASS (backend) - Style works but had 502 timeout in one test run
features_verified.photoshoot_page: PASS - Shows product selection, brief suggestions, Generate button
features_verified.photoshoot_generate: PASS - Generates product photo with valid base64
features_verified.library_page: PASS - Shows Scraped images, Uploaded content, AI generated items
